name: Xtra Energy Corp.
summary: Xtra Energy Corporation engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold properties in Africa. It holds interest in the Malimba mining concession consisting of 2 mining production permits covering 72 mining blocks and 61 square kilometers located in Lubutu lands, province of Maniema. The company was formerly known as X-tra Petroleum Inc. and changed its name to Xtra Energy Corporation in November 2010. Xtra Energy Corporation was founded in 1997 and is based in Fruitland, Idaho.
